des: Max Muncy pops out to first baseman Matt Olson.

Braves challenged (play at 1st), call on the field was overturned: Lawrence Butler grounds into a double play, second baseman Ozzie Albies to shortstop Mauricio Dubón to first baseman Matt Olson. Jacob Wilson out at 2nd. Lawrence Butler out at 1st.
Jacob Wilson reaches on a fielding error by shortstop Mauricio Dubón.
